entry.title: SYSTEM pw for HANA SYSTEMDB database
entry.content: I was following instructions from "3501306 - How To - Reset the SYSTEM User Password in the System Database" to reset/reactivate the SYSTEM user in SYSTEMDB database.  instead of asking for new pw it stopped the instance.  I don't know what steps to take to reset the pw and restart the instance.  any assistance is appreciated.  Thanks.

entry.title: Report on AP Invoice Approval workflow
entry.content:
Hi, 

We need a report of AP Invoice approval matrix (App: Manage Workflows for Supplier Invoices) but can't seem to extract this data from SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud system. We are not looking for a report of approvers of each Invoice but rather the approval matrix itself. There are no apps or released CDS views to extract this data from. Could you please advise if this is possible?

Kind Regards,

Praneetha

entry.title: What to install first, SAP GUI or the SAP 3D Visual Enterprise Viewer, in an installation package?
entry.content: We are creating a "SAP GUI suite" installation package, which will be installed for all our SAP GUI users, in a Microsoft Windows environment. This package will contain the latest version of the SAP GUI and the "SAP 3D Visual Enterprise Viewer 9.0". It will be created in Microsoft SCCM (System Center Configuration Manager). A separate package will be created for the 32 bit and 64 bit versions. Our question is which part is best installed first, the SAP GUI or the "SAP 3D Visual Enterprise Viewer 9.0"? Then we can build this into our installation package.

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Intent Based Navigation
entry.content:
I tried using adaptNavigationParameterExtension( ), but it only lets me add or remove parameters, it does not allow changing Semantic Object and Actions. 

I traced the calling program to the following SAP method onDataFieldWithIntentBasedNavigation in  CommonEventHandlers

Does anyone know how to overwrite this method and change SemanticObject?

I read a similar issue identified by @gregorw here but it doesn't work for us. The semantic object annotation does not take a Path, only a String.

entry.title: Re: SAP Activate Project manager Certification
entry.content: Is there any documentation about ACT100 and ACT200 to download?

entry.title: Key Updates for Suppliers revealed in 'Live Series with the NEAT Team' event
entry.content:
On May 28th, 2025, we hosted the second installment of our 'Live Series with the NEAT Team', diving into critical updates shaping the future of the SAP Business Network.

Highlights of the Session:

  • Invoice Strategy Update: Christoph Neumann provided a detailed overview of the latest changes in SAP’s invoice strategy, offering insights into upcoming developments and their impact, as well as answered supplier questions.
  • Supplier Innovations: Elizabeth Cramer shared valuable information on upcoming innovations designed to benefit SBN suppliers, helping businesses stay ahead of the curve.

This webinar was specifically tailored for Standard and Enterprise Account suppliers aiming to optimize their use of SBN to drive business growth.

Event Details:

  • Date: Held on May 28th, 2025
  • Access: If you missed the live session, you can still catch up by registering for the on-demand recording here.

Stay informed and ahead of the game with the latest developments in the SAP Business Network. Don’t miss out on future sessions in our Live Series and other webinars, here!

entry.title: Re: SAP EWM: Pallet Storage Strategy by HU Type
entry.content: Great Explanation!!

entry.title: Re: remove material master mrp1 tab
entry.content:
SAP does not allow the deletion of individual views once they are created in standard transactions like MM02.

But you can handle this in a way:

Set MRP Type to "ND" (No Planning)

This is the standard and safest way to deactivate MRP functionality:

  • Go to MM02 (Change Material).

  • Navigate to the MRP1 tab.

  • Set MRP Type = ND (No planning).

  • Remove any lot sizing, procurement type, etc.

    This effectively deactivates MRP for the material without actually removing the tab.

    It’s commonly used for non-MRP-managed items.

entry.title: Deleted No show event in Job history.
entry.content: We have an SF profile where the no-show event was deleted via Job History, but upon deleting it, the SF profile became active, but later that day pass on the User is missing in the whole SF system.

entry.title: Retrocalculation causing tax withholding in state that should not have taxable income
entry.content:
Hello All,

We found a coworker who on the 12/10/21 payroll check had $0.31 in taxable income to the state of Iowa. They lived in Iowa all year but worked in Minnesota all year. There should be no Iowa taxable income and was not until the 12/10/21 paycheck. The only thing I found was WT8115 (OT Premium) totaled $0.31 -- the same amount as the Iowa taxable income.

The 12/10/21 paycheck did have many IT2010 records entered for past pay periods, which we believe contributed to the issue.

Does anyone know what would cause the IA taxable income to suddenly appear when nothing was changed with this coworker's Resident and Work state?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: SuccesFactors Compensation - Compensation Inbox Info...
entry.content:
Hi @Olskar 

As far as I know, only through a report (adhoc will give you all this).

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Re: Update Eligibility Rule after Variable Pay form has b...
entry.content:
@NicolasC67 @baskoro87 @rebeccanussba 

Sorry to ask again but why are you using the Manager Form Eligibility Rule ?...

do you need to use 3 dates to control eligibility ? Why can't you use the two rules available under Plan Setup > EC Settings. I've never had to use Manager Form Eligibility Rule.

See this discussion: https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-successfactors-compensation-user-group/manager-form-eligibility-rules-scheduling/td-p/14093289

Once we have a valid use case for its use + a enhancement request we can push with Product (I am not Product).

Thanks !

Xavier

entry.title: Re: Representation of multiple contracts of employees alo...
entry.content: @akoutsompinas Yes ! Concurrent Employment feature in use means people can be planned by different planners in the Compensation module. Same for International Assignment feature.

entry.title: MaCo Onboarding Agent: Exploring its Multi-Agent AI Architecture
entry.content:
Overview

As AI-driven transformation reshapes enterprise systems, intelligent onboarding becomes essential for improving customer experience and accelerating product adoption. In MaCo (SAP Market Communication for Utilities), we are driving an innovation initiative by developing the MaCo Onboarding Agent—a multi-agent AI solution.

The MaCo Onboarding Agent is designed to engage with customers before they subscribe to MaCo saas. On request, the agent is intended to collect essential information such as Global Account, subaccount, and subdomain, and generate an onboarding incident to initiate and manage the onboarding process. This removes manual overhead, especially for customers with multiple subscriptions.

Using a vectorized knowledge base from MaCo documentation, downstream service documentation, and FAQs, the assistant offers real-time, context-specific support. For example, based on the customer's monthly message volume, the assistant can recommend the appropriate subscription plan, for testing or production use, by referencing the relevant information maintained in the FAQs. This ensures customers receive timely and contextually accurate guidance, improving their overall experience.

Architecture: Engineered for Scalability, Modularity, and Intelligence

The MaCo Onboarding Agent is built on a supervisor-level multi-agent architecture, designed with a modular and extensible technology stack:

  • Python with LangChain and LangGraph: Serves as the orchestration layer for agent-based interactions. LangChain provides structured tooling for chaining LLM prompts and external calls, while LangGraph introduces persistent, event-driven workflows with stateful memory management and multi-agent routing logic, exposed as a RESTful API.
  • SAP CAP (Cloud Application Programming) using Node.js
  • SAP BTP (Business Technology Platform)
  • SAP HANA for Semantic Search and Context Retrieval 
    MaCo documentation, downstream service documentations and references, and FAQs are converted into vector representations stored in SAP HANA's vector database. This allows the assistant to perform semantic searches and retrieve information based on meaning rather than exact keywords. At runtime, relevant content is dynamically retrieved from the vector store to build context for responses.
  • Multi-Model Support (e.g., GPT-4.0, Gemini): Enables runtime selection of multiple large language models based on use case requirements such as accuracy vs. latency trade-offs, tokens constraints, and response time requirements. The classification logic is also handled by LLMs, based on the prompt and input context.

User Interface

 

 

What’s in Progress

The MaCo Onboarding Agent extends its capabilities beyond a standard chatbot assistant. Integration with JIRA and ServiceNow APIs is also underway, enabling a dedicated agent to create and manage incidents.

Business Benefits

Efficient Onboarding Process

  • Accelerates the onboarding process by providing context-specific support and resolving queries in real-time
  • Particularly valuable for enterprise customers with high-volume onboarding requirements by automating manual tasks.

24/7 Real-Time Support

  • Leverages a vectorized knowledge base for real-time, context-aware assistance.
  • Once subscribed, customers go through multiple setup steps. The assistant provides on-demand access to knowledge from MaCo documentation, downstream service references, and FAQs—enabling users to resolve known issues or questions independently. This reduces reliance on support teams and minimizes delays caused by time zone differences or limited team availability.

Continuous Customer Engagement

  • Keeps customers informed on ongoing issues with downstream services or MaCo issues by gathering information from FAQs.
  • Ensures ongoing transparency and trust during the onboarding lifecycle.

Conclusion

The MaCo Onboarding Agent demonstrates how intelligent automation and a multi-agent solution can enhance the efficiency and consistency of early customer interactions. By providing access to relevant information and supporting decision-making with contextual guidance, the solution enables a more scalable and responsive customer experience.

Ongoing enhancements would explore extended capabilities, including deeper integrations, improved coordination between agents, and alignment with evolving customer and product needs.

entry.title: SAP CALM alerts for SAP Data Intelligence (DI) and SAP cloud HANA
entry.content:
We have enabled SAP CALM alerts for SAP DI and SAAP Hana cloud database on BTP sub account. We could like to understand how the alerts are triggered and do we have any option to create custom events or metrics in CALM health monitoring.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP CALM alerts for SAP Data Intelligence (DI) and SA...
entry.content:
In checking Expert Portal: https://support.sap.com/en/alm/sap-cloud-alm/operations/expert-portal/setup-managed-services/setup-di.html -> SAP Data Intelligence is only supported with Operations use case Integration & Exception Monitoring, so you will not have access to this service in Health Monitoring.

There are several resources with information of your queries about event configuration for Health Monitoring and Integration and Exception Monitoring, these are two different things although similarly configured, that I would refer you to:

  • KBA 3482250 - How the event setting works for the Integration Monitoring - SAP Cloud ALM -> has link to configuration guide:  https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-alm/applicationhelp/im-configuring-events
  • KBA 3436616 - How to configure SAP Cloud ALM Health Monitoring metric thresholds, alerts, and e-mail notifications?
  • KBA 3543572 - Relation between Metrics and Events in Health Monitoring application in Cloud ALM -> which has link to KBA : 3398745 - Can custom Events be defined for missing metrics in the various SAP Cloud ALM Use Cases? -> Health Monitoring does not allow custom metrics to be defined in IEP.
  • KBA 3445128 - SAP Cloud ALM Integration & Exception Monitoring Help

SAP Community offers blog:

  • https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/cloud-alm-health-monitoring-for-event-configuration/ba-p/13575560
  • https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/monitoring-integration-issues-with-the-new-issues-detected-event-in-sap/ba-p/13964435 (link at bottom to setting up events in SAP Help Portal)
  • https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-members/configuring-sap-cloud-alm-for-integration-and-exception-third-party/ba-p/13709340

I believe you will find the information needed here.

Best regards,
SAP Technical Support

entry.title: Re: required data does not exist in this plant IAI1 for t...
entry.content:
To solve this question, the following solutions may work

1. Extend Material to Plant IAI1

  • Transaction: MM01 (Create Material) or MM02 (Change Material)

  • Enter the material number, industry sector, and material type

  • Select the required views (Basic Data, MRP, Sales, etc.)

  • Enter plant IAI1 and other relevant organizational levels

  • Maintain all mandatory fields and save

2. Check Existing Material Data

  • Transaction: MM03 (Display Material)

  • Verify if the material is extended to plant IAI1

  • If not, use MM01 to extend it.

Thanks.

entry.title: CPI Starter Mission - Unable to identify proxy for host
entry.content:
Following the starter mission at 

Request Product Details with an Integration Scenario | SAP Tutorials

And when it comes to test the API, I get a 404 : 

{
  "fault": {
    "faultstring": "Unable to identify proxy for host: default and url: /products/details",
    "detail": {
      "errorcode": "messaging.adaptors.http.flow.ApplicationNotFound"
    }
  }
}

As far as I can tell, everything is deployed, saved, active etc.

My iFlow is at
https://********btrial.integrationsuite-trial.cfapps.ap21.hana.ondemand.com/shell/design/contentpackage/ZPDTrial/integrationflows/Trial2 Suite

I've seen a few other posts to the same effect, but  no useful responses, other than just "try again" which I've done to no avail...

Definitely echo other posters saying that this puts them off CPI ! Any help gratefully received!

entry.title: Live Sessions | Getting Started on SAP Learning Hub for Students and Beginners
entry.content:
New to SAP Learning Hub, Student Edition? We’ve got the perfect session for you!

Join our colleague David in a beginner-friendly live session that walks you through everything you need to know to get started! 

Upcoming Sessions (GMT-3):

  • June 9, 2025 | 11:30 – 12:15
  • July 9, 2025 | 05:00 – 05:45
  • September 8, 2025 | 11:30 – 12:15
  • November 5, 2025 | 06:00 – 06:45

This 45-minute live session is designed to help students and beginners get the most out of their free SAP Learning Hub access. You’ll discover how to explore available content, start Learning Journeys, access hands-on practice systems, and understand the process for scheduling SAP certification exams.

By the end, you'll feel confident using the platform and ready to take your first steps toward building valuable skills.

No prior experience needed — just an academic email address to access the Student Edition for free!

Register here

entry.title: SAP FIORI APP upgrade impact analysis
entry.content:
Hi,

 

We have upgraded SAP S/4HANA (Sandbox) from 1909 to 2023 FPS2. As we went through the post checks, we have found the following issue.

Made a spot check of F0928A which according to the analysis should not be available. This turned out not to be true, also the Readiness check report did not contain information about the app being unavailable.

  • Fiori apps extracted from our roles and analyzed in the Fiori upgrade impact analysis tool as provided by SAP
  • A list of 41 unavailable APPs identified
  • Random APP amongst the 41 checked in our system and is still seemingly working just fine.

Questions:

  • Are the APPs in the list still available but “not recommended”?
  • Is the list not accurate, “false positives”?

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP FIORI APP upgrade impact analysis
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

I hope you're doing well.

 

Please note that the upgrade impact analysis tool is provided to make the upgrade process easier.

App F0928A is deprecated as of SAP S/4HANA 2023 and should not be used.

This is also explained in KBA 3574080 - SAP Fiori Upgrade Impact Analysis Report Showing Deprecated/Unavailable Features as Available.

Please keep in mind that all the information about apps in the App Library is provided by the App Teams, not the Fiori Launchpad Team.

Thus, any further questions you need to ask for specific apps need to be addressed to the respective teams, which for F0928A is CO-FIO-BPC-IS.

The tool should not return false positives, but it is entirely dependent on the information published in the Fiori Apps Library by the App Teams.

 

Best regards,
SAP Technical Support / Fiori Launchpad Team

entry.title: Re: Mess Change Supplier Master - adding Partner Role
entry.content:
Hi Haily,

Have you explored an API for this scenario? Please find here some details:

  • Business Partner (A2X)
  • Supplier Purchasing Partner Functions

Hope this helps.

Arturo Montes de Oca

entry.title: Re: Why AW01N show negative Net Book Value
entry.content:
Hi @RTN

Planned depreciation is automatically calculated based on Depreciation key and useful life. If you want to remove planned depreciation, you can just simply change depreciation key to zero depreciation. But make sure your last asset fiscal year is closed as any changes in asset master affect all asset open years.

Check check and confirm the thread as lot of new questions are going on in a single thread. Please respect the community guidelines. Thank you

Regards

Vijaykumar

entry.title: Re: Populating properties of a public dimension through a...
entry.content:
@N1kh1l 

Thanks for your inputs Nikhil. Using a calculated column for both L3 and L2 with below formula did the trick!

IF([L3]="",
        IF([L2]="",
                [L1],
                [L2]
        ),
        [L3]
)

entry.title: Local Integration Process Clarification
entry.content:
Dear All,

If we have a flow like below.

Main Integration Process (MIP)  -->  Local Integration Process 1 (LIP1)  --> LIP2

If I set any header in a groovy in LIP2 will this be available in LIP1 and MIP? My understanding is the headers are global in scope and all steps in an iFlow should be able to read and set them. I tried but LIP2 headers are not visible in LIP1. I also tried to define them in LIP1 first and set them in LIP2 but that also didn't help to read them in LIP1/MIP.

Also, what about the exception handling in LIP2 and LIP1? What is the best practice here? Is there any limitation if we have nested processes like this and is there any limit on them?

Thanks!

Kim

entry.title: Re: Key-user extensibility and updating fields
entry.content: What is the case now?  sap should have done you are expecting.

entry.title: Can Profile Preview or Spotlight be configured to include the profile fields userId or empId?
entry.content: Looking for a way to find this value from the org chart without having to browse through to the full profile page.  Thought that if we could configure either empId or userId to show on the profile preview or on spotlight then we could look for the value while remaining on the org chart page.

entry.title: Re: 2H 2024 Release Highlights for the Compensation Module
entry.content:
Hi @35969 

Carbon copy features remains untouched by this enhancement and still only triggers a copy of the worksheet in someone's Completed inbox folder when the worksheet gets routed to completed. Also note that it's all related to the planner used in the workflow so if you use 2nd hierarchy for planning you won't be able to send a copy of the worksheet to hierarchical managers of the employees in the worksheets. Only to someone connected to the 2nd Manager.

Maybe plan for read-only exec review access for regular managers to trigger upon completion.

All the best,

Xavier

entry.title: Meetup SAP 2025 no Rio de Janeiro!
entry.content:
Olá a todos,

Estamos muito animados para anunciar o nosso próximo “Encontro da Comunidade SAP" no Rio de Janeiro no dia 26 de junho de 2025!

Este evento será uma oportunidade fantástica para todos os profissionais e entusiastas SAP do Rio de Janeiro se reunirem num Happy Hour e criarem um networking orgânico, QR codes trocados no improviso e muito “me chama no LinkedIn”.

Essa é mais uma chance de nos conectarmos,  trocar ideias e construir uma comunidade local SAP mais forte.

Local:
Data: 26 de Junho de 2025
Local: Cafofo Pub, Botafogo, Rio de Janeiro

SAP Community

entry.title: MI07 Problema na atribuição de impostos (J1BTAX) em NF gerada por inventário
entry.content:
Olá, pessoal!
Estou com uma situação no SAP ECC relacionada à nota fiscal gerada automaticamente por inventário, onde apenas o primeiro item da nota tem a redução de base de ICMS corretamente atribuída. Os demais itens assumem grupos fiscais genéricos (10/99), ignorando o cadastro correto da J1BTAX.

Cenário:
A nota é gerada automaticamente após movimentação de inventário (ex: MB1A / 701).

A J1BTAX está corretamente configurada para todos os materiais.

A função J_1B_IM_TX_CALCULATE_TAX_NEW é chamada para o cálculo fiscal, e percebi que o problema acontece no PERFORM get_tax_parameters, onde para os itens a partir do segundo, o sistema já não localiza os grupos corretos.

A estrutura XKOMV[] já chega preenchida na função, mas aparentemente os KSCHL não refletem as condições como acontece na MIRO.

Testes já realizados:
Executei o mesmo cenário via MIRO: os impostos são aplicados corretamente a todos os itens.

Revisei a J_1BCONDMAPV, e os KSCHL estão mapeados corretamente.

Comparei a J1BTAX e o grupo de impostos por material — está tudo certo.

Debuguei a função e percebi que após o 1º item, a lógica de atribuição de grupo fiscal não consegue recuperar os dados da J1BTAX.

Na MIRO, o grupo fiscal é atribuído corretamente a todos os itens — no inventário, apenas ao primeiro.

Pergunta:
Existe alguma particularidade na chamada da função de cálculo de imposto quando a nota é gerada por movimento de mercadoria (inventário), que afete a leitura correta da J1BTAX ou do mapeamento fiscal?

Ou ainda:

Alguma recomendação de nota SAP, configuração complementar ou workaround para garantir que todos os itens da nota de inventário tenham os impostos atribuídos corretamente?

entry.title: Re: update NACH Partner (output determination) on System Copyback / Refresh
entry.content: SAP has note 3529816 that explains that NACH-PARNR is NOT part of the BDLS process but they do not offer any assistance on how to handle it for this table. I think we will write a program to do the conversion. We already export and import the RZ20 and RZ21 data that is related so now we have things out of sync post refresh.

entry.title: Re: Running Revenue Recognition (EPMFC) in Higher WBS level
entry.content:
Hi Owen,

i don't think this answers the question raised. Even i'm getting errors when planning multiple GL accounts at header WBS level. Business does not want to put soo much work in adding plan values with respect to WBS and then GL accounts.

Please let me know if there is a smarter way

entry.title: External checkbox grayed out when trying to change a number range from internal to external
entry.content:
What would be the best way to merge three EAN number ranges into one, but one of them is internal and already has been used (has a number range status greater than 0).
The external checkbox is grayed out when trying to change the number range internal to external
The system throws error message NR587 "Entered number level is less than the previous level. Interval" if I try to change it to 0.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: External checkbox grayed out when trying to change a...
entry.content:
External checkbox is grayed out because you cannot change an internal number range to external if it has a number range status greater than 0.

Set the number range status to 0, then mark the number range as external and save. 

If you are going to use the number range interval to external, just ignore the warning message NR587. 
Changing number range status to a lower number than it already is may lead to duplicate internal numbering materials, but if the range is not used as an internal number, there's no issue.

To solve any overlap issues and understand better how number range works, please take a look on the following blog post:

  • How does number ranges works in Product Master SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud? | SAP Community

Kind Regards, 
Ícaro

entry.title: Why is there no Order field for 933 goods movement via MIGO (replaces MB1A in S4HANA)?
entry.content:
When I try to create a 933 goods movement using MIGO transaction in place of MB1A (Obsolete in S4HANA) I see only one field to enter Cost center and no field to enter internal order.  Why is the Order field missing?  If this is intended, please provide the process that may be used to create a 933 goods movement with an internal order.  See screenshot below where I expected to see the internal Order field in MIGO.

MIGO - no Order field exists:

MB1A - Order field exists:

entry.title: Re: How to convert days in a month to 30 so I can perform 30/360 calculations?
entry.content: I am trying to calculate loan yields using the 30/360 method. I need this for a given month or YTD. Currently I can accomplish this by using the number of days we have already in the system, that is, 31 for Jan, 28 for February end so on. However, I need the number of days for each month to be equal to 30, total year 360 and use them in my cross calculations

entry.title: Re: Dangerous goods indicator is not enabled in FU General data tab?
entry.content: Project@12345

entry.title: GRC 12.0 - Access Request Notifications - URL Maintenance
entry.content:
Hello,

Where would the URL for Access Requests notifications be maintained in the GRC AC environment? Currently our email notifications for access requests are links using HTTP so they are failing to work and need to be updated to HTTPS.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Internal server error in additional data collection step
entry.content:
Hello!

I had the same problem with my admission.

Reproducing the Scenario:

ONBOARDING 2.0 > Collection of additional data
Step performed by the Onboardee, at which point he fills in the information that will be mapped into the customized MDF objects. When accessing the step, Onboardee encounters the error "Internal Server Error"

Cause:
Some of the custom objects did not have permissions for the ExternalUser

Resolution:
Access the role permission groups of your external users in > Manage permission roles > Access your external user's role permission group Onboardee (in my case: OnboardingExternalUser and also ONB - External Collaborator) > Edit > Next > Miscellaneous permissions > Grant viewing and editing permissions to all custom objects that you need the external user to access > Next > Save

This answer was written in Portuguese and translated to English via Google Translate, so the name of the screens you need to access may be different in your language.

Anyway, I hope I helped.

entry.title: Re: Unable to assign packaging material type
entry.content: Thank you for replying, Ilina. I already maitain "Handling Unit Type" and "Standard HU Type" in the WM packaging in the material master.

entry.title: Re: How can you create a Story Report that shows who has...
entry.content:
We had similar issues when trying to use the advanced filter to drill down to the current plan year, I can't tell from your screenshot if you are filtering on this field or not. Once we removed that advanced filter and placed a simple filter on the Primary Objective table (named Primary Goal at my org)  for the plan year, we then saw the employees without any goals. 

One other thing we found in testing was that when starting with the Objective/Goal table we got similar results, only showing those who had goals created. We started with Personal Info, but I would think using the User Info as a starting point would work the same way.

entry.title: Re: Configure a tile on SAP Build Work Zone to manage Decision artifacts
entry.content: @spatil_cengage thanks, the only app host ID I see from my service key is the one under html5-apps-repo, is it that one you are referring?

entry.title: How to edit Purchase Order Item Messages ?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Help Community,

I have a question regarding Purchase Order Item Messages and I need your help.

My requirement is to change the type of one item message in the purchase order item messages.

For example here in the picture below the type of the message is Warning message and it is standard message that is going to be shown if the material status is "F2".

The requirement is:

  • when the the delivery plant(EKKO-RESWK) is initial, the message should be displayed as Error message and not as a warning message
  • when the the delivery plant(EKKO-RESWK) is not initial, the message should be not displayed anymore, e.g, the message should be removed from the item messages

So my question is: Can I achieve this requirement via customization(if yes can you please tell me how) or is there any BADI or customer function or user exit in order to edit the purchase order item messages ?

I would be grateful  for any suggestion you may have.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Cash Application
entry.content:
Hi,

 

if there is a PDF you can upload it via the Cash Application, you find more information here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_CASH_APPLICATION/102154267af9489a88ff32e6416defc3/cb61b966e0a24d8bab288b994f339801.html?q=advice

But what might be also of interest in the future could be the new SAP Document AI: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RRIu5AOwe_I

 

But it's still being enhanced with functionalities. But you should reach out to your account manager and ask about a roadmap with a possible integration intoremittance advices.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Re: EWM & QM integration - Quality inspection after GR from production
entry.content: Very well written, thanks for contributing and sharing @Yuri_Nogueira !

entry.title: Other Bank (IT0009 subtype 1) sequence
entry.content:
Hello - 

Does anyone know what determines the sequence for Other Bank  (IT0009 subtype 1)?   Is it the earliest BEGDA? Follow-up question, is there a way to control the sequence (1st, 2nd, 3rd, etc. ... then main bank)? 

Thanks,

Brandyn

entry.title: Re: WHAT IS BIN SORTING AND HOW IT HELPS?
entry.content: Hi Juergen, you mean to say there is no significance for sorting in PTWY and PICK, right? PTWY happens based on naming sequence or CLSP sorting. And Picking happens based on stock removal rule like FIFO or LIFO, Right? Can you confirm.

entry.title: Re: Unable to assign packaging material type
entry.content: Packaging material type is mandatory in sales view for a material to be a packaging material. Please give packaging material type. If you are giving packaging material group, packaging material type should be assigned to packaging material group.

entry.title: Re: initialization of data source failed on SAP B1 Interactive analysis
entry.content: Hi, Kushan Did you manage to solve this issue? I have the same problem.

entry.title: Bin sorting in EWM
entry.content: Hi guys, Does bin sorting in EWM has any significance for picking and put away activities. Because putaway happens in bin naming sequence or as per sorting with Crossline put away sorting. And picking happens as per stock removal rule such as FIFO or LIFO. Then what is significance of sorting for putaway and picking?

entry.title: How to add custom fields in Long Term Supplier Declaration Inbound Fiori app in SAP GTS
entry.content:
Hi ,

In SAP GTS , there are no CFL to add custom fields to standard apps . Can you please guide step by step how to add custom fields like producer code and net cost to Long Term Supplier Declaration Inbound Standard Fiori APP .

Also if standard fiori app needs to be copied to custom fiori app , what are the ABAP required changes to be done for custom fiori app.

Detailed Explanation with Example would be appreciated .

Regards,

SN

SAP Global Trade Services  @SAP  SAP Fiori OData

Hi,

when I'm trying to create a Cost estimate for product cost collector with WIP(MTS / Product costing by period) I'm getting the below error

 

i have run CK40N for this product 

just wanted to let you know that BOM and routing both exists   

I have maintained MRP4 

OSP2

 

version 

but earlier when i have created a product cost collector without WIP then it worked  and i was able to do all the steps till settlement with no issue  

MRP

OSP2

 

please feel free to ask questions ,like anything you want to know about my earlier config

 

Thanks 

Jeshwant

entry.title: How to update or remove notification emails using the Java SDK
entry.content:
I have several hundred reports with notification emails I'd like to clean up using the Java SDK. I've been able to update the first email listed. However, I can’t figure out how to remove the subsequent email addresses. Also, is it possible to just turn off the notifications in the default settings (using the SDK)?

Version: SAP 4.3 SP4

CMC > Folders > Report > Default Settings > Notification

Query Builder

SELECT SI_ID,
       SI_NAME,
       SI_PROGID,
       SI_INSTANCE,
       SI_SCHEDULEINFO.SI_NOTIFICATION
FROM CI_INFOOBJECTS
WHERE SI_ID IN (8822)

// Connect to the SAP CMS
BCM.initializeSAPJCE();
IEnterpriseSession eSession = null;
ISessionMgr sessionMgr = CrystalEnterprise.getSessionMgr();
eSession = sessionMgr.logon(user,password,cmsName,cmsAuthType);

// Initialize Infostore objects
IInfoStore iStore = null;
IInfoObjects oInfoObjects = null;
IInfoObject oInfoObject = null;

// Query Builder query
iStore = (IInfoStore)eSession.getService("InfoStore");
oInfoObjects = (IInfoObjects)iStore.query("SELECT TOP 1000000 "
	+ "SI_ID, SI_NAME, SI_SCHEDULEINFO.SI_NOTIFICATION "
	+ "FROM CI_INFOOBJECTS WHERE SI_ID IN (8822)");
	
System.out.println("Number of reports: " + oInfoObjects.size());

if (oInfoObjects.size() > 0) {
	for (int i =0; i < oInfoObjects.size(); i++) {
		String SI_ID = "";
		String SI_NAME = "";
		try {
			oInfoObject = (IInfoObject) oInfoObjects.get(i);
		
			SI_ID = oInfoObject.properties().getProperty("SI_ID").getValue().toString();
			SI_NAME = oInfoObject.properties().getProperty("SI_NAME").getValue().toString();
			System.out.println(SI_ID + ": " + SI_NAME);
		
			ISchedulingInfo schedulingInfo = (ISchedulingInfo)oInfoObject.getSchedulingInfo();
			IProperties schedulingProperties = (IProperties)schedulingInfo.properties();
			System.out.println("Scheduling Info > Properties");
			
			IProperties SI_NOTIFICATION = (IProperties)schedulingProperties.getProperties("SI_NOTIFICATION");
			IProperties SI_DESTINATION_SUCCESS = (IProperties)SI_NOTIFICATION.getProperties("SI_DESTINATION_SUCCESS");
			IProperties successNotificationOne = (IProperties)SI_DESTINATION_SUCCESS.getProperties("1");
			IProperties SI_DEST_SCHEDULEOPTIONS = (IProperties)successNotificationOne.getProperties("SI_DEST_SCHEDULEOPTIONS");
			IProperties SI_MAIL_ADDRESSES = (IProperties)SI_DEST_SCHEDULEOPTIONS.getProperties("SI_MAIL_ADDRESSES");
			IProperty emailOne = (IProperty)SI_MAIL_ADDRESSES.getProperty("1");
			System.out.println("SI_NOTIFICATION > SI_DESTINATION_SUCCESS > 1 > SI_DEST_SCHEDULEOPTIONS > SI_MAIL_ADDRESSES > 1");
			
			emailOne.setValue("UpdateEmail@example.com");
			iStore.commit(oInfoObjects);
			
			IProperty emailTwo = (IProperty)SI_MAIL_ADDRESSES.getProperty("2");
			System.out.println("SI_NOTIFICATION > SI_DESTINATION_SUCCESS > 1 > SI_DEST_SCHEDULEOPTIONS > SI_MAIL_ADDRESSES > 2");
			
			// Tried these and they broke the report in the CMC
			//emailTwo.setValue("");
			//emailTwo.setValue(null);
			//SI_MAIL_ADDRESSES.remove("2");
			//SI_DESTINATION_SUCCESS.remove("1");
			//iStore.commit(oInfoObjects);
			
		} catch (NullPointerException e) {
			System.out.println("Try Catch Error");
		}
	}
}

eSession.logoff();

entry.title: Is GRC 12 Unicode system will support Non-Unicode ERP Plugin system?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Is GRC 12 NW Unicode system will support Non-Unicode ERP Plugin system?

NW 7.52 with GRC 12 System (GRCFUND_A_V1200) is standalone GRC Unicode system

EHP7 for ERP 6 with GRC 12 plugin(GRCPINW V1200_750 0028 SAPK-V1228INGRCPINW) Non-Unicode system.

Is there any Compatibility issues with respective Unicode GRC and Non-Unicode ERP plugin system?

#GRC12,#EHP7 ERP

Thanks

Ramesh

entry.title: Lookup Table Business Rule
entry.content:
Hi

We are facing an issue where the business rule is deriving the conditions for variables and IF condition but while setting the value on the requisition it is picking wrong values from the lookup table or values are blank.  We have tried the rule in 2 different ways.

Rule 1: Direct rule to map Salary Min and Salary Max from lookup table based on Country and Grade in the requisition. Rule is only picking first value in the lookup table.

Rule 2: Using Variables to populate Salary Min and Salary Max from lookup table based on Country and Grade in the requisition. Rule is only picking first value in the lookup table

Any suggestions please.

entry.content:
Dear expert, 

I'm facing authorization error for training existing intelligent scenario SUPLRDELIVPREDICT. I'm having SAP_BR_ADMINISTRATOR role but still not authorized to train the model. 

Training failed : SUPLRDELIVPREDICT - model Suplr_Delvry_PredYou don't have any authorization to Create Model Version for Intelligent Scenario SUPLRDELIVPREDICT.

I tried to trace the missing auth but i dont see failed object in Authorization tracing. 

Any idea what role is missing to train model in Intelligent Scenario?

@PritiDhingra 

Regards,

Ben

entry.title: Re: Logout functionality SAP CAP application deployed in Cloud Foundry using Managed approuter
entry.content:
Hi Raihan,
Could you please try adding the logout property to your xs-app.json like below:

{
  "welcomeFile": "/index.html",
  "authenticationMethod": "route",
  "logout": {
    "logoutEndpoint": "/logout",
    "logoutMethod": "GET",
    "logoutPage": "/index.html"
  },
  "routes": [
    {...},
    {...}
  ]
}

And make sure to remove all the cookies & cache before redirecting the user to the logout page.

function _logoutUser() {
  localStorage.clear();
  sessionStorage.clear();
  const cookies = document.cookie.split(";");

  for (let i = 0; i < cookies.length; i++) {
    const cookie = cookies[i];
    const eqPos = cookie.indexOf("=");
    const name = eqPos > -1 ? cookie.substring(0, eqPos) : cookie;
    document.cookie = name + "=;expires=Thu, 01 Jan 1970 00:00:00 GMT;path=/";
  }
  sap.m.URLHelper.redirect("./logout", false);
  BusyIndicator.show(0);
}

entry.title: Re: FAQ & Troubleshooting Guide for @sap/datasphere-cli

I am able to login and able to see the secrets. We have configured the OAuth Client with grant_type "Authorization code" and given purpose as "Interactive usage", and provided all access. But when I try to do "datasphere spaces list" it throws me the following error. Please suggest a fix.

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Implementing SAP BTP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI - enabling SSO and MFA with corporate IdP
entry.content:
Hello @KimHall ,

Yes it can support if your user's SNC name is p:CN=<user_email>.

The change would be in IAS tenant , go the application-> Secure login service. Go to the Subject name identifier setting and set the primary attribute as EMAIL.
You can go through the below reference links for more information:

Set Up the Common Name Attribute for User Certificates | SAP Help Portal

Configure the Subject Name Identifier Sent to the Application | SAP Help Portal

Thanks!

Regards,

Aniket

Happy to help!

entry.title: Re: Why is there no Order field for 933 goods movement vi...
entry.content:
Hi @JeannineGardner1 

Try using below SAP Path - 

SPRO > MM > Inventory Management & Physical Inventory > Settings for enjoy transactions > Settings for goods movements (MIGO) > Field Selection per movement type. 

If your field not available, try to add the same in the above path. 

Please check and confirm.

 

Regards

Vijaykumar

entry.title: Planning Modernization
entry.content:
Reflections on BW Modernization and Its Implications for Planning in the Cloud

Since the announcement of the Business Data Cloud (BDC) a few months ago, I’ve followed numerous discussions surrounding the topic of BW Modernization with great interest. Given my background in planning applications and analytics architecture, these conversations have sparked several ideas about how the principles of BW Modernization could be extended—particularly toward modernizing planning landscapes.

Put simply: How can existing BW customers, especially those using multiple BPC (Business Planning and Consolidation) solutions, transition to the cloud without losing the value of their current investments? This question lies at the heart of Planning Modernization, and exploring it opens up promising pathways to integrate established assets with future-proof cloud architectures.

The Data Product Generator applied to Planning Solutions

The SAP Data Product Generator is a framework that allows users—particularly data domain owners and business analysts—to define, generate, and manage data products directly within SAP's ecosystem, such as the SAP Datasphere.

It promotes a decentralized approach to data ownership, following the principles of data mesh, and provides reusable, governed data entities that can be consumed across analytical and operational use cases.

The Data Product Generator can play a key role in planning applications.

Imagine you are operating a classic BW system and decide to transition to BW/4HANA Private Cloud Edition (PCE) or to BW7.5 PCE.

In this scenario, the Data Product Generator enables you to transform existing data models and planning scenarios into structured, reusable data products, enriched with business semantics and governance. This not only facilitates integration with modern cloud-based solutions, but also lays the foundation for a future-ready planning architecture.

You could use your plan cubes or plan ADSOs and provide the data stored there inside Datasphere as a source. And this is charming. Why?

At the same time, you may already be developing your new planning applications using Seamless Planning. In this approach, SAP Datasphere serves as the underlying physical data storage.

Imagine this: a user presses the save button in your SAP Analytics Cloud planning application, which is running on BW/4HANA PCE or BW7.5 PCE. Instantly, the corresponding data becomes available within Datasphere—no duplication, no delay, fully integrated.

This real-time connectivity enables a modern, hybrid planning landscape, combining the robustness of BW with the agility of cloud-native planning and analytics.

Your investments are not lost, you are still able to profit from them. With BW7.5 PCE until 2030 and with BW/4 PCE until 2040.

Target Group, Is ths Approach for you?

Who Might Benefit from This Approach?

This approach is particularly well-suited for customers with medium to high complexity BW systems.

If your system landscape is relatively simple, a greenfield approach using Seamless Planning might be the better option—allowing you to move away from the PBC world entirely and start fresh in the cloud.

However, many organizations soon realize that their Business Warehouse landscape is more complex than expected. While it's theoretically possible to narrow the project scope or drastically simplify planning processes, this often conflicts with legitimate business requirements that cannot be ignored.

In such cases, trying to rebuild everything from scratch—without BW and PBC—may result in delays, compromises, or unmet requirements. A hybrid approach that builds on your existing assets can provide a faster, more realistic path forward.

And you could foster the datasphere capabilities on your BW data and your data coming from seamless planning, which is quite powerful.

Another Advantage: Flexibility Without Immediate Commitment to BW/4

One of the key advantages of this approach is the flexibility it offers. You don't need to make an immediate decision to upgrade to BW/4HANA. Instead, you can simply move your existing SAP BW 7.5 system to the Private Cloud Edition (PCE) and start your modernization journey gradually.

This gives you time to assess your needs: perhaps by 2030, you’ll have successfully replaced your BW-based solutions altogether—without ever needing to transition to BW/4HANA. But if you later determine that a BW/4 upgrade is still necessary, the project can be seamlessly executed within the same PCE environment.

This approach offers a low-risk, future-proof path that adapts to your organization's pace and priorities.

What can you do already right now in your planning projects?

When designing your current planning landscape, it’s important to critically evaluate the need for BPC. If your planning requirements can be fulfilled using Seamless Planning or SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) Native Planning, that route is typically the preferred and future-ready approach. Of course, in certain cases, there may still be valid reasons to rely on BPC.

If you are currently implementing BPC-based solutions, make sure to use modern ADSO structures that are compatible with the Data Product Generator—this ensures smoother transitions and delta handling in future scenarios.

Also, take a close look at your frontend strategy. SAP Analytics Cloud offers a powerful and forward-looking interface for planning and analytics. Ask yourself whether using alternative tools is justified, especially if it might result in additional migration efforts down the road.

entry.title: Re: Cannot reach s4dhost.wdf.sap.corp . "error code: 503;...
entry.content:
I fixed it 😊

I did two things:

* I made an API provider with connection type "Internet" instead of "On premise". This according to parameters in the chapter.
* I switched from Chrome browser to Firefox instead. Even if I cleared cache in Chrome the connection was not stable.

 

 

 

 

Test Connection was successful

/Regards Joakim

entry.title: Re: CALL TRANSFORMATION - CX_ST_COND_CHECK_FAIL exception
entry.content:
It works as explained in the ABAP documentation.

  1. Inside tt:d-cond you have a "literal XML element" so it's a "pattern", which fits the current element of the input XML.
  2. No "using" defined in tt:d-cond so go to 3.
  3. Evaluation of the instruction body hence reading the input XML value "false", which is transformed to " " because it's XSDBOOLEAN (as explained in asXML)
  4. No assertion "data" in tt:d-cond so go to 5.
  5. You have "check" in tt:d-cond so the condition is evaluated but not met (the value " " is initial, but you expect not initial), the deserialization is canceled with the exception CX_ST_COND_CHECK_FAIL.

Why do you use "check"?

That would work if you specify tt:d-cond alone. Or even tt:cond.

Official ST documentation: ABAP Keyword Documentation

entry.title: Re: Cannot reach s4dhost.wdf.sap.corp . "error code: 503;...
entry.content: Thank You

entry.title: Re: Cannot reach s4dhost.wdf.sap.corp . "error code: 503;...
entry.content: I do not recognize exact same dilemma. But I went back in course and double- and triple-checked the settings one must do in BTP regarding instances and role collections. The "On premise" variant of connection I could not get to work. But "Internet" connection works for me now.

entry.title: App "API Business Hub Experience" is not accessible from "SAP Integration Suite" for my trial accont
entry.content:
Hi

According to chapter in course "Developing with SAP Integration Suite" https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/developing-with-sap-integration-suite/creating-a-product_fc942de6-ff7b-4263-bd2b-f33fe481bc3d
One shall be able to see and access app/ecosystem "API Business Hub Experience".

But that is not visible for me.

The AuthGroup-rolecollections are in place for my user as I see it:

  • AuthGroup.ContentAuthor
  • AuthGroup.Site.Admin
  • AuthGroup.Content.Admin
  • AuthGroup.APIPortalRegistration
  • AuthGroup.API.ApplicationDeveloper
  • AuthGroup.API.Admin

Anyone else have same issue? Is something missing in my BTP setup perhaps?

 

Expected to see this when hovering over "Ecosystem" in SAP Integration Suite:

This is what I see instead:

 

Overview of instances in my SAP BTP Cockpit:

 

/Regards

Joakim

entry.title: Re: CALL TRANSFORMATION - CX_ST_COND_CHECK_FAIL exception
entry.content: Thank you. Basically I want to check if the specific element is bound in the incoming XML since it is optional.

entry.title: Re: MIGO additonal quantities
entry.content:
If the material has an OIL specific view in the material master data check if the UOM group assigned to it have the EA UOM, if it doesn't add it in: 
Industry Solution Oil & Gas (Downstream)--> HPM (Hydrocarbon Product Management)  -->  Oil- and Gas-Specific Units of Measure and Additional Stockkeeping Units  -->  Define Additional Stockkeeping Units of Measurement

entry.title: Re: locking object from ADT api not working
entry.content:
Hello Rahul,

I meet the same issue. And finally solved by a workaround:

https://github.com/marcellourbani/abapfs_extensions

It is a extension of ABAPFS which worked on the VSCode. You can implement it in your system. Then, the issue will be disappeared.

BRs
